'''âdh-y-ng''' ('''kadhayang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ricochet|ricochet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ricochet|ricochet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-y-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kadhayang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhayang|thidhayang]] || [[word:jidhayang|jidhayang]] || [[word:shidhayang|shidhayang]] || [[word:kidhayang|kidhayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhayang|thuthudhayang]] || [[word:jujudhayang|jujudhayang]] || [[word:shushudhayang|shushudhayang]] || [[word:kukudhayang|kukudhayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhayang|thudhayang]] || [[word:judhayang|judhayang]] || [[word:shudhayang|shudhayang]] || [[word:kudhayang|kudhayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhayang|thudhayang]] || [[word:judhayang|judhayang]] || [[word:shudhayang|shudhayang]] || [[word:kudhayang|kudhayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhayang|thedhayang]] || [[word:jedhayang|jedhayang]] || [[word:shedhayang|shedhayang]] || [[word:kedhayang|kedhayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhayang|thothodhayang]] || [[word:jojodhayang|jojodhayang]] || [[word:shoshodhayang|shoshodhayang]] || [[word:kokodhayang|kokodhayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhayang|thodhayang]] || [[word:jodhayang|jodhayang]] || [[word:shodhayang|shodhayang]] || [[word:kodhayang|kodhayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhayang|thodhayang]] || [[word:jodhayang|jodhayang]] || [[word:shodhayang|shodhayang]] || [[word:kodhayang|kodhayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhayang|thĂŠdhayang]] || [[word:jĂŠdhayang|jĂŠdhayang]] || [[word:shĂŠdhayang|shĂŠdhayang]] || [[word:kĂŠdhayang|kĂŠdhayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhayang|thathadhayang]] || [[word:jajadhayang|jajadhayang]] || [[word:shashadhayang|shashadhayang]] || [[word:kakadhayang|kakadhayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhayang|thadhayang]] || [[word:jadhayang|jadhayang]] || [[word:shadhayang|shadhayang]] || [[word:kadhayang|kadhayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhayang|thadhayang]] || [[word:jadhayang|jadhayang]] || [[word:shadhayang|shadhayang]] || [[word:kadhayang|kadhayang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhayang|shadhayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhayang|goshadhayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhayang|gokishadhayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhayangnĂŒ|shadhayangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayangnknĂŒ|goshadhayangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayangnĂŒ|gokishadhayangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhayangshĂ«|shadhayangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkshĂ«|goshadhayangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhayangshĂ«|gokishadhayangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayangro|shadhayangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkro|goshadhayangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayangro|gokishadhayangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayangmu|shadhayangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkmu|goshadhayangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayangmu|gokishadhayangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhayangsher|shadhayangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhayangnksher|goshadhayangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhayangsher|gokishadhayangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhayang|shadhayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkng|goshadhayangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhayang|gokishadhayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhayangya|shadhayangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkya|goshadhayangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhayangya|gokishadhayangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhayangyam|shadhayangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkyam|goshadhayangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhayangyam|gokishadhayangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhayangnĂŒshĂ«|shadhayangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhayangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhayangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhayangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhayangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayangnĂŒro|shadhayangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayangnknĂŒro|goshadhayangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayangnĂŒro|gokishadhayangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayangnĂŒmu|shadhayangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayangnknĂŒmu|goshadhayangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayangnĂŒmu|gokishadhayangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhayangshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhayangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhayangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhayangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayangshĂ«ro|shadhayangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkshĂ«ro|goshadhayangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayangshĂ«ro|gokishadhayangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayangshĂ«mu|shadhayangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkshĂ«mu|goshadhayangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayangshĂ«mu|gokishadhayangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhayangronĂŒ|shadhayangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkronĂŒ|goshadhayangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayangronĂŒ|gokishadhayangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhayangroshĂ«|shadhayangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkroshĂ«|goshadhayangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhayangroshĂ«|gokishadhayangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayangromu|shadhayangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkromu|goshadhayangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayangromu|gokishadhayangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhayangmunĂŒ|shadhayangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkmunĂŒ|goshadhayangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayangmunĂŒ|gokishadhayangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhayangmushĂ«|shadhayangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkmushĂ«|goshadhayangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhayangmushĂ«|gokishadhayangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayangmuro|shadhayangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayangnkmuro|goshadhayangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayangmuro|gokishadhayangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
